name: Histology Feature Extraction (stLearn)
description: Extract deep-learning morphological features from Visium H&E histological images using a pre-trained ResNet50 model, and normalize gene expression spatially (SME normalization) for multimodal data fusion.

use_gpu.description: Use GPU for faster deep learning extraction if available.

cnn_base.description: Pre-trained Convolutional Neural Network used for morphological feature extraction.

n_components.description: Number of Principal Components to compress the image features.

physical_distance.description: Scale distance factor for constructing the morphological-spatial network.

file.description: 10x Visium formatted spatial transcriptomics data (h5ad) containing H&E images in unstructured data (uns).

output_config.collection_description: Outputs the multimodal fused h5ad containing spatial morphological normalized gene expression (SME).

items.description: Updated AnnData object (h5ad format) containing deep learning extracted features in obsm['X_morphology'] and SME normalized gene expression data in the main X matrix or specific layers.
Spatial plot showing the morphological dimension reduction capturing tissue architectures purely from images.
Text report detailing the neural network configurations, time elapsed, and model metadata.
